title: hieracium bupleuroides subsp. wahlenbergii
intro: Hieracium bupleuroides subsp. wahlenbergii is a subspecies of the Hieracium bupleuroides plant, a type of hawkweed native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing swelling and relieving urinary tract issues, making it a potential treatment for conditions like kidney stones and urinary retention. Herbal preparations of Hieracium bupleuroides subsp. wahlenbergii can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal herb.
